title: List running processes
description: Collect normalized process rows with CPU, memory, PID, parent PID, and command metadata.

title: Top CPU processes
description: Rank processes by CPU usage.

title: Top memory processes
description: Rank processes by working set memory.

title: Process details by PID
description: Return merged process details for one PID.

title: Process details by name
description: Return merged process details for one exact process name.

title: Process tree by PID
description: Build a parent-child tree around one PID.

title: Process executable path
description: Return the executable path for matching processes.

title: Process command line
description: Return command-line text when available.

title: Process count
description: Count running processes after filters are applied.

title: Duplicate process names
description: Detect process names that appear more than once.

title: Long-running processes
description: Find processes that have been alive for a long time.

title: Likely idle heavy processes
description: Flag processes with high memory use and low CPU.

title: Process risk classification
description: Classify candidate processes using protected and helper heuristics.

title: Dry-run kill process by PID
description: Preview what would be killed for a PID.
intent_examples: dry run kill process by pid

title: Kill process by PID
description: Terminate a process by PID using a guarded action.
avoid_if: You do not have explicit approval for a mutation.

title: Dry-run kill process by name
description: Preview what would be killed for an exact process name.
intent_examples: dry run kill process by name

title: Kill process by name
description: Terminate processes by exact image name using a guarded action.
avoid_if: You do not have explicit approval for a mutation.

title: CPU summary
description: Summarize CPU state, logical cores, and recent utilization.

title: Memory summary
description: Summarize physical and virtual memory state.

title: Disk usage summary
description: Summarize disk capacity and free space.

title: Uptime summary
description: Summarize boot time and elapsed uptime.

title: Machine summary
description: Summarize host, OS, CPU, memory, and session data.

title: OS version summary
description: Summarize the OS version and build information.

title: Live counter snapshot
description: Capture a current performance counter snapshot.

title: Threshold warning report
description: Compare live system metrics against warning thresholds.

title: Running services
description: List running services with normalized metadata.

title: Stopped services
description: List stopped services with normalized metadata.

title: Service details by name
description: Return service metadata for one exact service name.

title: Auto-start services
description: List services configured to start automatically.

title: Non-Microsoft services
description: List services whose binary paths look third-party or custom.

title: Service control preview
description: Preview a start, stop, or restart action for a service.

title: Start service by name
description: Start a service using guarded approval and dry-run support.
avoid_if: You do not have explicit approval for a mutation.

title: Stop service by name
description: Stop a service using guarded approval and dry-run support.
avoid_if: You do not have explicit approval for a mutation.

title: Restart service by name
description: Restart a service using guarded approval and dry-run support.
avoid_if: You do not have explicit approval for a mutation.

title: List startup entries
description: List startup commands from Windows startup metadata.

title: Startup folder items
description: List items in user and common startup folders.

title: Registry startup items
description: List Run and RunOnce registry startup entries.

title: Scheduled tasks summary
description: Summarize scheduled tasks and their state.

title: Suspicious startup candidates
description: Flag startup items that look path-based or script-based.

title: Duplicate startup candidates
description: Detect startup names and commands that appear multiple times.

title: List listening ports
description: List listening TCP ports and UDP endpoints.

title: List established connections
description: List established TCP connections.

title: Process-port mapping
description: Map processes to their listening ports and connections.

title: Basic network activity summary
description: Summarize port, connection, and remote peer activity.

title: Local network diagnostics summary
description: Summarize local adapter and IP configuration.

title: Temp cleanup candidates
description: List candidate temp files and directories for cleanup review.

title: Stale log candidates
description: List old log files and likely stale log artifacts.

title: Generate diagnostics report
description: Build a combined Task Manager style diagnostics report.

title: Generate machine readiness report
description: Build a local AI readiness and command availability report.

title: Generate process health snapshot
description: Build a focused process health snapshot.

title: Before/after optimization snapshot
description: Compare two snapshot payloads for resource changes.

title: Protected processes
description: Return the protected process allowlist used by the pack.

title: Protected services
description: Return the protected service allowlist used by the pack.

title: Process action policy
description: Classify a process or process name against kill safety rules.

title: Service action policy
description: Classify a service or service name against control safety rules.

title: Windows skill pack lookup
description: Resolve Windows requests to imported skill candidates.
success_criteria: Resolved exact or ranked candidate skills from imported pack.

title: Windows skill pack execute
description: Execute a resolved Windows skill with confirmation guardrails.
avoid_if: The user did not approve risky/admin actions.
Resolver confidence is low; use lookup first.
